# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand with two locations in Bo Phut and Plai Laem.

## About
Chor Ratchawat is a family-run Muay Thai camp rated 5.0 out of 5 stars on Google, with 396 verified reviews across our two camps (255 Bo Phut, 141 Plai Laem). We offer group classes, private 1-on-1 lessons, kids programs, and fighter training. Open 6 days a week, 8 AM to 8 PM.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/): Overview of our camp and programs
- [Programs](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/programs): All training programs
- [Pricing](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/pricing): Training prices from 400 THB drop-in
- [Booking](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/booking): Book and pay online
- [Bo Phut Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/bo-phut): Our intimate street gym
- [Plai Laem Camp](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/camps/plai-laem): Our larger facility
- [DTV Visa](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/visa/dtv): Destination Thailand Visa support
- [Contact](https://ratchawatmuaythai.com/contact): Phone, email, directions

## Contact
- Website: https://ratchawatmuaythai.com
